topic: Classifying angles as acute, right, or obtuse
latex:
Fill in the blanks to complete a true statement about angle $ABC$ below.

[DIAGRAM]

Angle $ABC$ is \_\_\_\_\_\_ because it is \_\_\_\_\_\_ than a \_\_\_\_\_\_ angle.
answer_latex: Angle $ABC$ is \underline{acute} because it is \underline{smaller} than a \underline{$90^\circ$} angle.
